fixture.prompt: A new SDK user should get their first successful response in five minutes. Review the proposed journey.
fixture.rationale: Persona journey, time-to-first-value, and friction evidence.

baseline_invocation.input: A new SDK user should get their first successful response in five minutes. Review the proposed journey.

candidate_invocation.input: A new SDK user should get their first successful response in five minutes. Review the proposed journey.

mechanical_port.allowed_difference: Package-local skill, section, support-artifact, and stable runtime path relocation only.

differences.explanation:
### User-language rule

Write questions, progress updates, reports, and artifacts in the language used by the user. Source material, code identifiers, commands, and quotations may remain in their original language when translating them would reduce accuracy.

### Signal-gated learning

Persist a learning only when the interaction contains a useful, reusable signal such as an explicit preference, correction, accepted recommendation, or rejected direction. Track helpful and harmful outcomes separately. Do not manufacture a learning merely because a workflow completed.

questions.evidence: The candidate exactly matches the deterministic installable port of the pinned 1.x workflow; only enumerated package-local path mechanics differ from the immutable oracle.
